changes.description: Fixed stale and mismatched AWS API Gateway reference link targets
Added `aws.apigateway#resourcePolicy` trait and OpenAPI mapper
Fixed an issue where traits would lose their types, reverting to DynamicTrait, when renaming shapes

Fixed selector parsing to properly handle extraneous BREAK_TOKENS (',', ']', ')') in a selector. This manifested in silently dropping contents in the comma case ("structure, string" was effectively just "structure"). For the closing brace/paren, the characters were silently ignored as seen in the additional fixed tests.
Fixed event stream test params encoding blobs in b64.
Added `aws.apigateway#minimumCompressionSize` trait and OpenAPI mapper
Added `aws.apigateway#gatewayResponses` trait and OpenAPI mapper with DANGER validation for CORS conflicts
Fixed a bug in OpenAPI conversions where onErrorStatusConflict from mappers/protocols wasn't being respected.
Added `aws.auth#cognitoUserPoolsScopes` trait for specifying OAuth scopes on operations that use an Amazon Cognito User Pools authorizer.
Added `aws.apigateway#apiTlsPolicy` trait and OpenAPI mapper
Fixed a Windows user PATH corruption in install.bat caused by setx silently truncating values over 1024 characters
Added `tlsConfig`, `responseTransferMode`, and `integrationTarget` sub-fields to the `aws.apigateway#integration` trait
Added copy-on-write optimization for `toBuilder()` via `BuilderRef.setBorrowed`
Fixed trait codegen to generate more specific return type for trait provider
Added `aws.apigateway#apiKeyRequired` trait and OpenAPI mapper
Fixed an issue where jsonName wasn't applied to examples in OpenAPI for restJson1
Fixed trait-codegen failure when string literals contain dollar signs
Added `aws.apigateway#endpointConfiguration` trait

Added `ipAddressType` field to the `aws.apigateway#endpointConfiguration` trait and added an OpenAPI mapper that writes `vpcEndpointIds` and `disableExecuteApiEndpoint` to the `x-amazon-apigateway-endpoint-configuration` extension.
Optimized model scoping in JsonSchemaConverter by constructing through a Model.Builder instead of filtering shapes.

Added a new protocol test for query operations with no output that can include `ResponseMetadata`. No assertions are done but protocol test runners should be able to handle the metadata without choking.
